---
title: 'BIO: Who Am I?'
date: '1980-01-02T05:29:00.0000000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: 'N2 Good Success Resource Center'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_post_id: '6253886839104077292'
blogger_filename: '/1980/01/bio-who-am-i.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/N2 Good Success Resource Center/feed.atom'
---

<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/darrell-about-5-36c7a72c2b66.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" height="149" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/darrell-about-5-5c6643edb05d.jpg" width="200" />&nbsp;</a></div>
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<a href="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/darrell-4-5-b371a18b4194.jpg" imageanchor="1" style="margin-left: 1em; margin-right: 1em;"><img border="0" height="166" src="/images/imported/blogger-googleusercontent-com/darrell-4-5-75ffdde2f183.jpg" width="200" /></a></div>
<div class="separator" style="clear: both; text-align: center;">
<br /></div>
<h4>
&nbsp;Who Am I?</h4>
<b>My name is Darrell G. Wolfe:</b><br />
<ul>
<li>I am a Servant Son of my Father God, My Lord Jesus, and my Friend Holy Spirit!</li>
<li>I am a Husband to my Flavia, Father to my Sons, Uncle to my Niece, and Son to my Parents</li>
<li>I am a Teacher, Coach, Trainer, Leader, Mentor</li>
<li>I am a&nbsp; Blog Writer, Published Author, Content Writer</li>
<li>I am an Audio Engineer, Singer, Song Writer, Musician</li>
<li>I am... Whatever else my Father asks me to be</li>
</ul>
<b>Some Random Things About Me:</b><br />
<ul>
<li>I enjoy making Excel Sheets (Just For Fun!)</li>
<li>My favorite foods are Cheeseburgers and Thai Food!</li>
<li>I read/study constantly, any topic I can...&nbsp;</li>
<li>Sci Fi Geek!</li>
<ul>
<li>Favorite Series</li>
<ul>
<li>Stargate <a href="http://stargate.mgm.com/view/series/1/index.html" target="_blank">SG1 </a>and <a href="http://stargate.mgm.com/view/series/2/index.html" target="_blank">Atlantis </a>(not a big SGU fan)</li>
<li><a href="http://www.startrek.com/" target="_blank">Star Trek</a> (ALL!)</li>
</ul>
</ul>
</ul>
<h4>
What have I done?</h4>
<ul>
<li><b>By Hobby</b>: </li>
<ul>
<li>Write Several Blogs, as time permits</li>
<ul>
<li><a href="http://n2gs.blogspot.com/">http://n2gs.blogspot.com/</a></li>
<li><a href="http://empoweredtooprosper.blogspot.com/">&nbsp;http://empoweredtooprosper.blogspot.com/</a></li>
<li><a href="http://texaslivinginfo.blogspot.com/">http://texaslivinginfo.blogspot.com/ </a></li>
<li>There are other less used sites if you can find them... (Scavenger Hunt!)</li>
</ul>
<li>Published "<a href="http://n2gs.blogspot.com/1980/01/banking-basics-for-believers.html">Banking Basics for Believers</a>"</li>
<li>&nbsp;Audio Engineer</li>
<ul>
<li>Part Time Audio Sound Board Tech, several churches 1996-Present</li>
<li>In School Now: "<a href="http://schooloftecharts.com/" target="_blank">School of the Tech Arts</a>" for potential career change. </li>
</ul>
<li>Singer - Musician</li>
<ul>
<li>Worship Leader for several small church youth groups</li>
<li>Song Writer for a short lived Christian Worship Rock Band</li>
<li>Some training in Classical Voice, Guitar, Theory, Piano, Percussion</li>
</ul>
</ul>
</ul>
<ul>
<li><b>Professionally</b>:</li>
<ul>
<li>Restaurant Server for 9 years</li>
<li>Banking and Personal Finance for 8 years: 2004 - Present</li>
<li>Other Things here and there</li>
</ul>
</ul>
<br />
<h4>
What am I doing?</h4>
<ul>
<li><b>Serving God by: </b></li>
<ul>
<li>Loving my Wife and Kids </li>
<li>Working toward a degree in Audio Engineering</li>
<li>Writing as often as possible</li>
<li>Studying every topic I possibly can, to keep my mind sharp</li>
<li>Helping People Succeed in life (both professionally and as a writer)</li>
</ul>
</ul>
<br />
<h4>
Where am I going?</h4>
<b>I don't know all of it...</b><br />
<br />
<b>Here are some ideas for the time being:</b><br />
<ul>
<li>Grow in Grace!</li>
<li>Love my Family !</li>
<li>Finish Audio School</li>
<li>Give More Time to Church </li>
<li>Write More Consistently</li>
<li>Publish More Books</li>
<li>Yada Yada Yada... Become a Billionaire (and give <i><b><u>ridiculously </u></b></i>to God's Kingdom)!!!</li>
</ul>
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
